data.title: Zacatecas Silver Boosts Private Placement to $3.75 Million for Strategic Expansion
data.description:
An update from Zacatecas Silver ( (TSE:ZAC) ) is now available.

Zacatecas Silver Corp. has announced an increase in its private placement financing to $3.75 million, which will support a drilling campaign on the Zacatecas Silver Project and other strategic initiatives. This move is expected to bolster the company’s exploration efforts and enhance its market position within the mining industry, particularly in the highly prospective regions of Mexico.

Spark’s Take on TSE:ZAC Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:ZAC is a Underperform.

Zacatecas Silver’s stock is currently facing significant financial headwinds, primarily due to a lack of revenue generation. The company’s strong equity position and zero debt provide some stability, but the reliance on financing activities to sustain operations highlights potential risks. The technical indicators suggest stability, but with caution advised due to potential overbought conditions. Valuation remains challenging due to negative earnings, making this a speculative investment with potential upside from recent exploration activities.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:ZAC stock, click here.

More about Zacatecas Silver

Zacatecas Silver Corp. is a mining company focused on two key projects in Mexico: the Esperanza Gold Project in Morelos State and the Zacatecas Silver Project in Zacatecas State. The company is engaged in the exploration and development of mineral resources, with a particular emphasis on silver and gold. The Zacatecas Silver Project is located in the prolific Fresnillo silver belt, known for its significant silver production.

Average Trading Volume: 421,648

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: C$11.68M

data.title: Fidelity D & D Bancorp Announces Board Member Retirement
data.description:
An update from Fidelity D & D Bancorp ( (FDBC) ) is now available.

On September 17, 2025, Fidelity D & D Bancorp, Inc. announced the immediate retirement of Richard M. Hotchkiss from its Board of Directors. Hotchkiss, who joined the board in 2020 following a merger with MNB Corporation, played a significant role in shaping the bank’s governance and organizational structure. His departure is not due to any disagreements with the company, and he will continue to serve as Chair of the Lehigh Valley Advisory Board. The leadership praised his contributions and expressed gratitude for his dedicated service, noting the lasting impact of his leadership on the company.

The most recent analyst rating on (FDBC) stock is a Buy with a $47.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Fidelity D & D Bancorp stock, see the FDBC Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on FDBC Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, FDBC is a Outperform.

Fidelity D & D Bancorp’s strong financial performance is the primary driver of its overall score, supported by solid revenue growth and profitability. The stock’s valuation is attractive with a fair P/E ratio and a good dividend yield. However, technical analysis suggests mixed signals, with potential medium-term resistance. The absence of earnings call and corporate events data limits further insights.

To see Spark’s full report on FDBC stock, click here.

More about Fidelity D & D Bancorp

Fidelity D & D Bancorp, Inc. is the parent company of The Fidelity Deposit and Discount Bank, a Pennsylvania state-chartered, FDIC-insured community bank headquartered in Dunmore, PA. The bank offers a range of financial services including personal and commercial banking, wealth management, and brokerage services. It operates 21 full-service offices across several counties and is committed to community service, having donated significant volunteer hours and funds to local non-profits.

data.title: ESGold Corp. Closes C$8 Million Private Placement to Advance Montauban Project
data.description:
An announcement from Secova Metals ( (TSE:ESAU) ) is now available.

ESGold Corp. has successfully closed a C$8 million private placement offering, which includes the full exercise of the Agent’s option. The proceeds will be used to advance the Montauban Project in Quebec and for general corporate purposes. Each unit sold in the offering consists of one common share and one warrant, with the warrants allowing purchase of additional shares at a set price until 2028. The offering was facilitated by Red Cloud Securities Inc., and the closing is subject to final approval by the Canadian Securities Exchange. This financial move is expected to bolster ESGold’s operational capabilities and enhance its market positioning in the clean mining sector.

Spark’s Take on TSE:ESAU Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:ESAU is a Neutral.

Secova Metals faces significant financial challenges, including no revenue and ongoing losses, which are critical risks. However, recent corporate developments like the OTCQB listing offer some potential for improved market exposure and investor interest. The technical analysis shows some positive trends, but the lack of profitability and dividend yield are notable concerns.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:ESAU stock, click here.

More about Secova Metals

ESGold Corp. is a fully permitted, pre-production resource company focused on clean mining and exploration innovation. The company is advancing its projects in Quebec towards production and feasibility, emphasizing sustainable resource recovery and exploration. Its flagship Montauban property is a model for responsible mining practices, combining near-term production with district-scale discovery potential.

Average Trading Volume: 277,797

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: C$48.33M

data.title: Ondine Biomedical’s Steriwave Shows Major Economic and Health Benefits at ICPIC 2025
data.description:
Ondine Biomedical, Inc. ( (GB:OBI) ) has shared an update.

Ondine Biomedical Inc. presented significant findings at the ICPIC 2025 conference, demonstrating the economic and health benefits of its Steriwave nasal photodisinfection technology. The analysis, conducted by the York Health Economics Consortium, showed that using Steriwave could reduce surgical site infections (SSIs) by over 40,000 annually in the UK, resulting in potential cost savings of over £190 million. This innovation not only improves patient outcomes by significantly reducing infection rates compared to existing treatments like Octenisan and mupirocin but also offers substantial economic value by decreasing hospital readmissions and extended stays.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:OBI) stock is a Buy with a £55.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Ondine Biomedical, Inc. stock, see the GB:OBI Stock Forecast page.

More about Ondine Biomedical, Inc.

Ondine Biomedical Inc. is a Canadian life sciences company specializing in light-activated antimicrobial therapies, known as photodisinfection, for preventing and treating infections, including those caused by multidrug-resistant organisms. The company has a range of investigational products based on its proprietary photodisinfection technology, with applications in nasal decolonization and other medical indications such as chronic sinusitis and ventilator-associated pneumonia.

Average Trading Volume: 388,395

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: £77.76M

See more insights into OBI stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: BlackRock Throgmorton Trust PLC Purchases Own Shares for Treasury
data.description:
BlackRock Throgmorton Trust PLC GBP ( (GB:THRG) ) has provided an update.

BlackRock Throgmorton Trust PLC has announced the purchase of 50,000 of its own ordinary shares at an average price of 589.56 pence per share to be held in treasury. This transaction will result in 26.48% of the company’s total issued share capital being held in treasury, which affects the voting rights and the calculation of market interest as per the FCA’s rules.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GB:THRG is a Outperform.
